src/main/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.general_idea: Explicitly define the base package for component scanning to ensure correct component discovery during the Spring Boot upgrade.

src/test/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.general_idea: Integrate Testcontainers to spin up a real Kafka instance for integration testing instead of relying on embedded or mocked brokers.
src/test/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.human_impl: Added @Testcontainers, @Container KafkaContainer, and @DynamicPropertySource to configure bootstrap servers dynamically.

src/test/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.general_idea: Replace the trivial context load test with a functional integration test that verifies end-to-end Kafka message production and consumption.
src/test/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.human_impl: Replaced contextLoads() with testProduceAndConsumeKafkaMessage() using @Autowired producer and @MockBean service.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Spring Boot Web Starter dependency to enable web application capabilities.
Add the Spring Kafka dependency to support Kafka messaging integration.
Add the Spring Boot Validation Starter to enable bean validation features.
Add the Spring Boot Data JPA Starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Add the MySQL Connector/J driver for runtime database connectivity.
Add Flyway Core dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency to support MySQL-specific migrations.
Add SpringDoc OpenAPI UI dependency to generate API documentation.
Add JavaFaker dependency to generate fake data for testing or seeding.
Add Spring Kafka Test dependency to support unit and integration testing of Kafka components.
Add Testcontainers base dependency to enable containerized testing infrastructure.
Add Testcontainers MySQL module to spin up MySQL containers for testing.
Add Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter module to integrate Testcontainers with JUnit 5 tests.
Add Testcontainers Kafka module to spin up Kafka containers for testing.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for lightweight testing scenarios.
Add the Flyway Maven plugin to execute database migrations during the build process.

README.md.general_idea: Replace minimal project title with comprehensive documentation including setup instructions, API usage, and testing details.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# spring-boot-kafka-test' with detailed sections on running docker-compose, starting the app, and interacting with APIs.
